claim_boundary: Use W2 total agreement only as a total-rate cross-check, not delayed component validation.
Treat delayed activation as an unresolved cross-code model systematic for the current analysis.
The leading resolved failure layer is full-geometry raw coupling before common detector response.
Do not claim photons are absent from TES deposits from local carrier labels alone.
Do not average TES/MEGAlib and FLUKA delayed central values.
recommended_treatment: Report delayed activation as an unresolved cross-code model systematic; keep the headline as a reference-model estimate and include both delayed values in validation/systematics context.
remaining_work: Runtime point-location in dominant Cu-64 source volumes
Final side-Compton/FoV reconstruction only if final-selection-level cross-code statement is required
